cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Andrew could have gone to the coffee shop. First, the problem says Andrew went to the coffee shop today, and we need to determine the possible time frame. The coffee shop is closed after 8pm, so whatever time he went, it had to be before 8pm. Let me list out the events in order with their times. Andrew woke up at 8am. So he was up by then. Then from 11am to 3pm, Elizabeth saw him fixing his computer at the electronic store. Then Jennifer saw him buying a bike at the bike shop from 3pm to 4pm. Then Anthony saw him buying cookies at the bakery from 4pm to 6pm. Then Betty saw him watching a movie at the theater from 6pm to 8pm.
